items.title: Stock Futures Drift Higher Ahead of Jobs, Inflation Data
items.description: Investors are awaiting the release of the January jobs report, which was delayed a week because of the shutdown, and the CPI data for January.

items.title: Risks Rise for Bitcoin, Gold, and Silver as Goldman Sachs Warns $80 Billion in Stock Selling
items.description: Goldman Sachs warns up to $80 billion in equity selling could intensify liquidity stress, raising risks for Bitcoin, gold, and silver.

items.title: Goldman Sachs revamps Nvidia stock forecast ahead of earnings
items.description: Nvidia shareholders are eagerly anticipating the AI-chip giant's quarterly earnings results on February 25. The stakes are particularly high, given mounting competition from AMD and Broadcom, yet Goldman Sachs thinks Nvidia will deliver a $2 billion revenue surprise. Analysts at the 157-year-old ...
